stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Flight from Bordeaux to Berlin at FL180. What can be expected at cruising level?

options.a: A strong wind from the left with 150 kt at the crossing of the jet stream.
options.b: ISOL EMBD CB in the area of Berlin.
options.d: Moderate icing about half way along the route and moderate turbulence second part of the route.
